description:
The best all-in-one screen recorder and video editor. Record your screen, add video effects, transitions and more.

Camtasia is a video-based screen capture program that enables users to demonstrate and communicate ideas or share knowledge using video. From quick video demos to extensive video projects, Camtasia has a wide range of editing tools to create video content from a variety of sources. Users can record from webcam or screen, introduce a variety of effects, and easily share videos over multiple channels.
New Features
RECORDING
Single Window Recording
Isolate your screen and audio recording to a single window or application without the distraction of anything else popping in to steal the focus.
EDITING
Rev Media (Beta)
Instantly make adjustments to Rev recordings right on the timeline. Quickly and effortlessly modify the look, layout, and effects for entire recordings or split sections of your video.
SETTINGS
Light Mode UI (Beta)
Not a fan of the dark side of Camtasia? Now you can brighten things up with the new Light Mode. Currently only available for Windows.
Feature Updates
EDITING
Rev Updates
The Rev editing workflow has been updated to include new looks, backgrounds, and effects. Your video will look better than ever in no time.
CURSORS
Changed the Cursor Elevation default settings based on the media type. Rev media is set to "Original Position in Media" and other media types are set to "Always on Top" by default.
SMART FOCUS
Smart Focus now works with cropped media.
ONBOARDING
Onboarding tooltips are turned on for all users by default.
MARKERS
Increased the max character length for Markers from 40 characters to 200 characters.
Updates for IT Administrators
- Updated Expat to version 2.7.1
Bug Fixes
- Fixed a bug where some HEVC video streams would fail to decode correctly.
- Fixed a bug where MP4 files recorded with Ring Central could fail to import.
- Fixed a user-reported startup crash.
- Fixed a crash that could occur when applying speech-to-text to assets that do not contain speech.
- Fixed a potential crash when adjusting "JKL playback" playback speed.
- Fixed bug which caused screen recordings to not honor the cursor elevation setting of a placeholder.
- Fixed the bug that installer errors can show during quiet installs in some cases.
- Fixed a bug where SmartPlayer info was not included in exported MP4 files over 3GB.
- Fixed a bug that could cause a blank word to be inserted when clicking on a media's transcript track.
- Fixed a crash that could occur when updating offline media.
- Fixed a bug where exported animated GIFs could have an 'extra' black line not present in the canvas.
